name: design-systems
description: Build, document, and maintain scalable design systems — from tokens and components to accessibility and theming.

skills.name: design-token
skills.description: Define and organize design tokens with naming conventions and usage guidance.

skills.name: component-spec
skills.description: Write a detailed component specification including props, states, variants, and accessibility.

skills.name: pattern-library
skills.description: Structure a pattern library entry with problem context, solution, and examples.

skills.name: naming-convention
skills.description: Establish naming convention systems for design elements, components, and tokens.

skills.name: accessibility-audit
skills.description: Conduct an accessibility audit against WCAG guidelines with severity ratings.

skills.name: theming-system
skills.description: Design a theming architecture for brand variants, dark mode, and high-contrast.

skills.name: icon-system
skills.description: Create an icon system specification covering grid, sizing, naming, and categories.

skills.name: documentation-template
skills.description: Generate structured documentation templates for design system artifacts.

skills.name: motion-system
skills.description: Define a motion system with duration tokens, easing vocabulary, and reduced-motion handling.

skills.name: design-system-governance
skills.description: Define how a design system evolves — contribution models, versioning, change management, and deprecation.

skills.name: localization-design
skills.description: Design interfaces that adapt gracefully to multiple languages, writing directions, and cultural contexts.

commands.name: audit-system
commands.description: Audit a design system for consistency, completeness, and accessibility.

commands.name: create-component
commands.description: Scaffold a full component specification from a name or description.

commands.name: tokenize
commands.description: Extract and organize design tokens from an existing design or stylesheet.
